input.message: Building PRD for Kevin's two-location Miami barbershop app — South Beach Cuts (walk-in heavy) and Wynwood Barbers (appointment heavy). 12 barbers total, 60/40 commission split, needs dual-branded booking pages, single owner dashboard, walk-in queue for South Beach, SMS reminders, visit-based loyalty, Stripe payments, and commission tracking.

phaseResults: Setting up your project: Scaffolded 8 files

Designing your pages: Generated 2 HTML designs: User App, Admin Dashboard
Setting up your data storage: Generated 13 database files (entities + migration)
Building the backend: Generated 11 backend files (controllers, services, DTOs)
Building the user interface: Generated 9 frontend files (pages, components, hooks)
Wiring frontend to backend APIs: Integration included in frontend build
Running API tests: API tests skipped (test infrastructure pending)
Running browser QA tests: Browser tests skipped (test infrastructure pending)
